taskTemplate.name: Withdraw Loan
taskTemplate.description: Process loan withdrawal at borrower request

subTaskTemplate.name: Borrower Withdrawal Documented
subTaskTemplate.description: Borrower Withdrawal Documented – Borrower's express withdrawal is documented in the conversation log; borrower must give clear indication they no longer wish to continue with the transaction

subTaskTemplate.name: Withdrawal Date Entered
subTaskTemplate.description: Withdrawal Date Entered – Enter the date the customer withdrew into the system, matching the date documented in correspondence; note: withdrawal letter must be sent within 3 business days of this date

subTaskTemplate.name: Send Withdrawal Notice
subTaskTemplate.description: Send Withdrawal Notice – Mark Done to send electronically to all borrowers; mark Issue to mail withdrawal letter
